This family comprises over 23,000 species, including various types of flowers, shrubs, and trees. The genus Aetheolaena is a small group of flowering plants, and Aetheolaena senecioides is one of its species. Aetheolaena senecioides is native to the Andean region, specifically in South America. The classification of Aetheolaena senecioides is further divided into kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, and class Magnoliopsida.
